query: light leak film burn red orange flare expired film
message: sub:film_artifacts/light_leak — anti_aesthetic — color casts, lens flare, expired film color shifts

response.objective_caption: Diagonal streaks of warm orange and white light run across a dark, textured surface, creating bright linear highlights against deep shadow. The surface appears to have a fine, woven or brushed grain, and no distinct objects or figures are visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph with extreme underexposure that crushes most of the frame into deep black shadow, showing diagonal streaks of warm orange and white light running across a dark, textured surface. The image abandons representational clarity in favor of formal qualities of light, color, and surface grain, with bright linear highlights cutting through the darkness and no distinct objects or figures visible.
